chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 527 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.2047/2025. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA No.2048/2025. 28.04.2026 Mr. Pervaiz Ahmad Memon, advocate for the applicant. Per learned counsel the question is squarely covered against the applicant department by virtue of judgment of Supreme Court dated 17.04.2025 passed in Civil Appeals No.1088 of 2013 and connected matters. In view hereof, the reference application is dismissed in limine. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
